name: @metorial/promptmateio
description: Build and execute multi-step AI workflows combining multiple AI systems (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Mistral, Stability AI). Create and manage apps, run batch processing jobs with CSV-style row data, and retrieve results. List and use pre-built templates for content generation, SEO optimization, and prospecting. Configure jobs with language and country localization. Register webhooks for job-level or row-level completion notifications. Retrieve available languages, countries, projects, and user account information.
